description: S44S - Ollama Setup Guide. Create OllamaSetupSheet bottom sheet with 4 setup steps, URL input, test connection button (GET /api/tags), connected state with model list, save button. Update model selector in chat_screen.dart for Ollama. Update onboarding page 6 to show OllamaSetupSheet instead of 'coming soon' snackbar.
steps: Create directory frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/settings/ if it does not exist.

Create frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/settings/ollama_setup_sheet.dart: A StatefulWidget bottom sheet with: (1) static show(BuildContext context) method to display the sheet, (2) 4-step numbered setup guide (Install Ollama, Pull a model, Start server, Connect here), (3) TextField for Ollama URL (default http://localhost:11434), (4) 'Test Connection' button that makes GET request to {url}/api/tags using dio, (5) On success: show connected state with model list from response, (6) 'Use Ollama' save button that stores URL in FlutterSecureStorage under key 'ollama_url'. Follow existing patterns: GoogleFonts.dmSans for body, GoogleFonts.dmSerifDisplay for heading, AppColors, AppSizes. Include error handling for network calls.

Update frontend/lib/presentation/screens/chat/chat_screen.dart: Add Ollama to _availableModels list with provider 'Ollama', model 'Ollama (Local)', color Color(0xFF0EA5E9). In the model selection tap handler, when Ollama is selected check FlutterSecureStorage for 'ollama_url' - if not configured, show OllamaSetupSheet.show(context) instead.

Update frontend/lib/presentation/screens/auth/onboarding_screen.dart: In _buildPageAddKey, the 'Or use Ollama locally' row at the bottom - wrap it in GestureDetector that calls OllamaSetupSheet.show(context) instead of being plain text. Import the setup sheet.
acceptance_criteria: OllamaSetupSheet has static show() method, 4 setup steps, URL input, test connection, connected state, save button
Test connection makes GET request to /api/tags endpoint
Ollama model appears in chat_screen.dart model list
Selecting Ollama without configured URL shows setup sheet
Onboarding page 6 'Or use Ollama locally' text opens OllamaSetupSheet
verification: Run: cd frontend && flutter analyze --no-fatal-infos 2>&1 | tail -20
findings: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot run flutter analyze to verify. All code is structurally correct. Created ollama_setup_sheet.dart with StatefulWidget, static show() method, 4 setup steps, URL input, test connection via Dio GET /api/tags, connected state with model chips, save to FlutterSecureStorage. Added Ollama to chat_screen.dart model list and onTap triggers setup sheet if no ollama_url saved. Updated onboarding_screen.dart to wrap Ollama text in GestureDetector with persian color.
